response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with notable contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source tooling that align with the role's needs. His deep testing culture, architectural flexibility, and cross-language proficiency (including Java/Kotlin) are major strengths, though his resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kubernetes in production contexts, and German language limitation may hinder local collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprises
Proven expertise in AI-agent systems and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong testing and DevOps background with Docker, CI/CD, and multiple testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in work experience, though equivalents exist
Limited evidence of direct Kubernetes or cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) production architecture beyond CDK
Basic German proficiency may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
